name: Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd. produces and sells phosphate products in China. The company's products include feed grade phosphate, fertilizer grade phosphate, and industrial grade phosphoric acid and fine phosphates, as well as iron concentrate powder. Kunming Chuan Jin Nuo Chemical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Kunming, China.
